note: Arm A = the breadth read funded 6 washed-out inflections. Arm B = the spotlight top-N. Grade fwd return vs SPY at 6/12/24mo; LLM-lift = A - B.
lesson: Rebuilding the queue around LOW-in-52wk-range (live Robinhood range) + live-field reconcile (drop financials/shells/recycled-tickers) roughly 4x-ed the read conversion (11%->40%). The kills were value traps (cheap-but-deteriorating); the keeps were washed-out QUALITY inflections priced as broken. The 52wk-range gate belongs IN the spotlight next.

adversarial_verify_2026_07_06.method: BEAR refutation pass, 1 skeptic per name, hunt landmines + data faults

refuted.EYE: catalyst contradicted by guidance (decel not reaccel)
refuted.FRPT: one-time $62M gain faked 'GAAP profit'; op margin 1.5%
refuted.NCNO: 'reaccel' is a price hike; target above every analyst PT

survive.ACVA: survives but -EV after volume leg refuted -> WATCH

adversarial_verify_2026_07_06.lesson: Single-pass reads were systematically TOO CREDULOUS (swallowed one-time gains, price hikes, asset-sale deleveraging, and decel-as-reaccel at face value). The BEAR pass is MANDATORY, not optional — it caught what every single read missed. 4 of 6 keeps were not real.
